rationale: Cycle 2 montre une régression critique: quality 55/100 (seuil 70) et confidence 50/100 (seuil 70). Seuls 2/5 domaines complétés (ui-ux=40%, gameplay=60%), les 3 autres (llm-lora, world-structure, visual-polish) en ERROR avec blockers non diagnostiqués. test_results.json créé (+5) mais stats_summary.json toujours absent (-15). Les 3 reviews sont livrées mais basées sur données incomplètes. Pattern critique: 60% des domaines échouent avec blockers vagues ('============'), suggérant un problème systémique (config worker? dépendances? permissions?). Pas de données de performance/autoplay pour valider les changements proposés. Régression par rapport au cycle 1 (85→55, 75→50) indique que le pipeline rencontre un blocage structurel nécessitant diagnostic humain.

critical_issues.title: llm-lora domain ERROR with vague blockers
critical_issues.status: UNDIAGNOSED — blocker content is separator line, no error message
critical_issues.impact: Cannot progress on LLM fine-tuning tasks

critical_issues.title: world-structure domain ERROR with empty blocker
critical_issues.status: UNDIAGNOSED — blocker is empty string, no error message

critical_issues.title: visual-polish domain ERROR with vague blockers
critical_issues.status: UNDIAGNOSED — blocker content is separator line, no error message
critical_issues.impact: Cannot progress on visual polish tasks

critical_issues.title: stats_summary.json still not generated
critical_issues.status: PERSISTENT from Cycle 1 — no progress on infrastructure gap
critical_issues.impact: No performance metrics baseline for game-design decisions

regression_analysis.interpretation: Significant regression — pipeline hit structural blocker affecting 60% of domains

recommended_human_actions: Diagnose why llm-lora, world-structure, visual-polish workers failed
Check worker logs for actual error messages (blockers are placeholder strings)
Verify worker script paths, permissions, dependencies
Decide whether to continue with 2/5 domains OR fix infrastructure first
Evaluate if game-design changes should be applied without autoplay validation
